generated_oml:
instance DS18S20Internal1 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer inside the box for internal temperature monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmission
]

instance DS18S20Internal2 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer inside the box for internal temperature monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmission
]

instance DS18S20Ambient : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer outside the box for ambient temperature measurement"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmission
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmission : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DS18S20Internal1, DS18S20Internal2, DS18S20Ambient
]

instance TemperatureMeasurementData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Temperature measurements from DS18S20 sensors used for model validation and parameter optimization"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmission
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyLibrary
]

instance ModelA : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Thermal model with 2 parameters: C_air and G_box"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyLibrary
]

instance ModelB : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Thermal model with 4 parameters: C_heater, C_air, G_heater, G_box"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyLibrary
]

instance RabbitMQBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker for communication between physical sensors and digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables SafetyMonitoringService, ThermalBehaviorSimulationService, FaultDetectionService, StateEstimationService, OptimizationService
]

instance RaspberryPi4 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller for processing sensor data and controlling actuators"
    DTDFVocab:enables SafetyMonitoringService, ThermalBehaviorSimulationService, FaultDetectionService, StateEstimationService, OptimizationService
]

instance ScipyLibrary : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python Scipy library for non-linear least squares calibration"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimizationService
]

instance MOSFETs : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "MOSFETs handling ~4A current for heatbed and fan control"
]

instance Optocouplers : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Optocouplers for signal isolation in PCB design"
]

instance OneWireProtocol : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "1-Wire protocol for sensor connectivity"
]

instance ThermalBehaviorSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation for thermal behavior prediction"
    DTDFVocab:provides ThermalPredictionInsight
]

instance SafetyMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring for safety compliance"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyComplianceInsight, PhysicalAdjustmentAction
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Fault detection algorithms for system anomalies"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectionInsight
]

instance StateEstimationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "State estimation for temperature dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperatureStateEstimationInsight
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization via model calibration to improve accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:provides ParameterUpdateInsight
]

instance ThermalPredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted thermal behavior from simulation models"
]

instance SafetyComplianceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Safety compliance status based on temperature thresholds"
]

instance FaultDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detected faults in the thermal system"
]

instance TemperatureStateEstimationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Estimated temperature dynamics based on sensor data"
]

instance ParameterUpdateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Calibrated parameter updates for thermal models"
]

instance PhysicalAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Decisions to adjust physical components (heatbed/fan) based on system performance violations"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance HeatbedActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Heatbed (214 × 214 × 3 mm) controlled via Raspberry Pi GPIO with MOSFETs and optocouplers for thermal regulation"
]

instance FanActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Fan (0.02 m³/s airflow) controlled via Raspberry Pi GPIO with MOSFETs and optocouplers for airflow regulation"
]

instance ThermalIncubatorSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Thermal incubator system consisting of styrofoam insulated container (0.03 m³ air volume), heatbed (214 × 214 × 3 mm), fan (0.02 m³/s airflow), three DS18S20 temperature sensors, Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller, PCB with MOSFETs and optocouplers, and power supply"
    base:contains HeatbedActuator, FanActuator, DS18S20Internal1, DS18S20Internal2, DS18S20Ambient, RaspberryPi4, MOSFETs, Optocouplers, OneWireProtocol
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands (e.g., heatbed activation, fan speed) generated by the DT controller are sent via RabbitMQ to the low-level driver, which executes them on the physical actuators using MOSFETs for current handling."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A centralized DT constellation comprising RabbitMQ server (hosted on Raspberry Pi), controller, low-level driver, and thermal models, with all components communicating via message-based interactions over RabbitMQ."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT operates in the 'as operated' lifecycle phase, integrating models and data from the deployed physical system for ongoing monitoring and optimization."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model fidelity validated through uniform temperature experiments (testing Assumption 1) and parameter calibration minimizing residual error; Model B better predicts heatbed thermal inertia with four parameters."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ-based communication using AMQP protocol over local network; Raspberry Pi hosts RabbitMQ server for message exchange between PT components and DT services."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "All DT components (RabbitMQ server, controller, models) are deployed on a single Raspberry Pi 4 Model B device."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safe protocol implemented in the low-level driver to prevent unsafe actuation; bang-bang controller with defined upper/lower temperature limits (LL, UL) ensures operational safety."
]
